summary: Iteration 172 - Spot Sync & Wave Badge Testing COMPLETE. Backend: All 7 tests passed (wave API, new spots, coordinate fixes). Frontend: Navigation verified (TopNav Map/Passport/Persona/Search/Notifications/Settings, BottomNav Home/Explore/Create/Messages/Me). Wave height badges visible on Explore page spot cards. Spot drawer wave badge code present but requires map interaction to test fully.

minor.issue: 404 errors in console - bookings endpoint returning 404 (pre-existing issue)

integration_issues.issue: Map shows 'Loading Waves' indefinitely when geolocation is denied - needs fallback to default location

critical_code_review_comments: Wave badge code correctly implemented in UnifiedSpotDrawer.js (lines 1455-1459)
Wave API GET /api/conditions/{spot_id} returns wave_height_ft correctly
New spots (Beach 91st Street, El Tunco, Playa Bonita) were in DB but had is_active=NULL - FIXED to is_active=true
Rockaway Beach NY coordinates correctly at 40.583, -73.798 (not SF coordinates)
Total spots: 1,210 (40 new spots added and activated)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All navigation verified, wave badges visible on Explore page

seed_data_creation: Fixed 40 spots with is_active=NULL to is_active=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 172 verified spot sync (1,210 total spots) and wave badge implementation. TopNav: Map (yellow) → Passport (emerald) → Persona → Search → Notifications → Settings. BottomNav: Home → Explore → Create → Messages → Me. Wave heights visible on Explore page spot cards (e.g., Snapper Rocks 4.1ft). Wave badge in drawer header requires map marker click to test.
